'''OnePlus Dominate Arena''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament hosted by [[NODWIN Gaming]] and OnePlus

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|b1=RagingMode
|b2=Shadow |b2link=Shadow (Caster)
}}

===Format===
*'''OnePlus Dominate Arena - March''' : March 18th - 21st
** 16 teams.
** 4 matchdays.
** 20 matches (5 each day).
